path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(0, 51, 102)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 315px; margin-left: 95px;
